sample_spec._mode: one of: chat, embedding, completion, image_generation, audio_transcription, audio_speech, image_generation, moderation, rerank, search
sample_spec._max_tokens: LEGACY parameter. set to max_output_tokens if provider specifies it. IF not set to max_input_tokens, if provider specifies it.
sample_spec._max_input_tokens: max input tokens, if the provider specifies it. if not default to max_tokens
